title: Department Of Engineering To Host Public Meeting For South Ave Bridge
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will host a public meeting on March 24, 2026, to present planned rehabilitation work on the South Avenue Bridge over Onondaga Creek and gather community feedback. Proposed work includes replacing bearings, rebuilding sidewalks, repairing masonry and concrete, and sealing/painting structural elements. Online comments will be accepted through April 10.

entity_refs.name: Seals Community Center at Kirk Park

political_signal.description: Mayor publicly champions infrastructure investment and safety improvements as critical city priorities; framing bridge rehabilitation as essential for connectivity and community service continuity.
